name: node-delegates
title: node-delegates
summary: delegate methods and accessors to another property
description:
delegate methods and accessors to another property
This library is a dependency for webpack. Webpack takes code targeted at
node.js and makes it run in the browser. Node.js comes with API of its own
that is not available in the browsers. Webpack exposes this code
to programs that are unaware they are running in a browser.
.
Node.js is an event-based server-side JavaScript engine.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use node-delegates because delegate methods and accessors to another property.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use node-delegates as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair node-delegates with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `node-delegates --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
